data.title: Provenance Gold Advancements at Eldorado Boost 2025 Prospects
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Provenance Gold Corp. ( (TSE:PAU) ) just unveiled an update.

Provenance Gold Corp. has made significant advancements in its Eldorado Gold Property, revealing a large, low-sulfur gold system that is deeper and more expansive than previously understood. The company expanded its land position, conducted geophysical surveys, and drilled core holes, discovering high-grade zones and increasing the potential of the property. Provenance has also secured amended payment terms for the Eldorado property option and concluded 2024 with a strengthened financial position due to warrant exercises.

More about Provenance Gold Corp.

Provenance Gold Corp. is a company in the mining industry, focused on gold exploration. Its primary project is the Eldorado Gold Property in Malheur County, Oregon.

data.title: Air India Expands Partnership with SATS and WFS for Global Cargo and Ground Handling
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

SATS ( (SG:S58) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Air India has significantly expanded its partnership with SATS Ltd. and its subsidiary Worldwide Flight Services by awarding 14 new cargo and ground handling contracts across major airports in Asia, Europe, the Middle East, and North America. This decision followed a global tendering process and highlights Air India’s commitment to enhancing its logistics processes and service levels, which are crucial to its ongoing transformation. The expanded partnership is expected to bolster SATS’s international coverage and operational capabilities, benefiting both companies and their stakeholders.

More about SATS

Headquartered in Singapore, SATS Ltd. is a major provider of air cargo handling services and Asia’s leading airline caterer. The company offers airfreight and ground handling services, including passenger services, ramp and baggage handling, aviation security services, aircraft cleaning, and aviation laundry through SATS Gateway Services. Additionally, SATS Food Solutions caters to airlines and institutions, operating central kitchens with large-scale food production.

data.title: REPT BATTERO Announces Investment in Indonesian Battery Factory
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Rept Battero Energy Company Ltd Class H ( (HK:0666) ) has issued an update.

REPT BATTERO Energy Co., Ltd. announced an investment in a new battery factory in Indonesia through its subsidiary, PT REPT BATTERO INDONESIA. This initiative involves a capital increase of US$139.5 million, with the company’s stake unchanged, aimed at strengthening its presence in Southeast Asia. The factory will focus on lithium-ion battery production, with an expected annual capacity of 8GWh. This move aligns with local government policies and aims to enhance resource efficiency and sustainable growth for the company, although it carries certain uncertainties.

More about Rept Battero Energy Company Ltd Class H

REPT BATTERO Energy Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company based in the People’s Republic of China, operating in the energy sector with a focus on the development, manufacturing, and sale of lithium-ion batteries and related components.

data.title: SSE PLC Announces Scrip Dividend Scheme for Shareholders
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest announcement is out from SSE ( (GB:SSE) ).

SSE PLC has announced the Scrip dividend scheme for its shareholders, offering them the option to receive dividends in the form of additional shares. The Scrip reference price for these shares is set at 1,611 pence per share, calculated based on the company’s share prices over a specified period. The maximum number of new shares that could be issued under this scheme is approximately 14.5 million, constituting around 1.3% of SSE’s issued share capital. Shareholders have until January 31, 2025, to elect to participate or withdraw from the scheme, with dividends or new shares scheduled to be distributed on February 27, 2025.

More about SSE

Century Sage Scientific Holdings Ltd ( (HK:1450) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Be Friends Holding Limited announced a significant increase in its Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV) for the fourth quarter of 2024, achieving approximately RMB6.22 billion, a 21.25% rise compared to the previous year. NEXUS AG ( (DE:NXU) ) has provided an announcement.

Miyoshi Limited ( (SG:M03) ) has provided an update.

Miyoshi Limited has announced a change in the address of its share registrar’s office to 36 Robinson Road, City House #20-01, Singapore, effective from January 13, 2025. Consequently, the company’s Register of Members and Index will also be relocated to this new address. This relocation is primarily an operational update and is not expected to have significant implications on the company’s market position or its stakeholders.
